news.paragraph: The recent headlines highlight a strong focus on AI infrastructure and its suppliers, with mentions of Quanta Services, Broadcom, and a key supplier of AI data center power equipment surging on explosive growth. A significant deal creating one of the world's largest utilities, which will power AI data centers, further underscores this theme. While airline fares are up and consumer credit card trends are noted, the dominant narrative is the robust expansion in AI-related industries.

headlines.title: Quanta Services, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges New Buy Point In AI Pullback
Airline Fares Are Up, But Americans Still Plan To Fly
Deal Creates One Of World's Largest Utilities, Major Power Provider For AI Data Centers
Broadcom Leads Five IBD 50 Stocks Near Buy Points; Most Are AI Plays
The Surprising Consumer Trend That Credit Cards Show
AI Data Center Power Equipment Supplier Surges As Growth Explodes
